transcription.text: My friends here both wear the popular-priced pantyhose. I'm wearing today's girl pantyhose Can you tell the difference? Today's girl is beautifully sheer My today's girl feels so comfy Today's girl fits so well My today's girl all sheer only costs $1.19 Right $1.19 today's girl pantyhose. Choose it for the quality buy it for the price
